title: Localize remaining native foundation and review inspector copy
summary: Move the remaining user-facing hardcoded copy in the native macOS foundation and review inspector surfaces into StudioStrings and the shared string catalog so native truth stays localized and consistent.
acceptance_criteria: Remaining user-facing hardcoded strings in `StudioMacFoundationWorkspace.swift` are routed through `StudioStrings` where practical.
Any remaining review-detail user-facing hardcoded strings touched by the slice are routed through `StudioStrings` instead of inline literals.
`AppleApps/Shared/Resources/Localizable.xcstrings` contains matching EN and CS entries for the new typed strings.
The native macOS app still builds after the localization pass.
Patch hygiene stays clean after the string and inspector edits.

evidence.note: Patch hygiene passed after routing remaining foundation and review coverage labels through StudioStrings.
HS-0006 ticket schema validated successfully in the lane checkout.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after the localization cleanup.

trigger.source_ref: Top gap in `.humble/status/current.json` after supported-app and preview branch cleanup.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice is intentionally scoped to localized native copy truth, not broader inspector architecture changes.
Non-user-facing structural literals such as scope ids, case labels, and system image names stay inline unless they become product copy.
